div1.entryFree: Tuned, adj. having a tune, sounding: and wish her (Philomela's) lays were t. like the lark, Pilgr. 198. new t. oaths, H5 III, 6, 80. with an accent t. in self-same key, Troil. I, 3, 53. his voice was propertied as all the t. spheres, Ant. V, 2, 84. cf. Sad-tuned, Compl. 4, and Well-tuned.
